top_signals.title: Three New ETFs to Watch
top_signals.summary: The SpaceX IPO set off a predictable frenzy—we look at who may lead the pack. Also, betting against AI, high-yield bonds, plus bonus mentions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UK housebuilders warn of ‘shockwaves’ as tariffs on steel imports double
top_signals.summary: Construction industry says levies will impose punitive costs despite government’s effort to soften blow
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HM Treasury: special advisers’ gifts, hospitality and meetings, January to March 2026
top_signals.summary: Data on gifts and hospitality received by special advisers, and meetings they attended with senior media figures.

top_signals.title: Ryanair scraps family seating fees after regulator launches probe
top_signals.summary: Budget carrier says families can now opt for random allocation of free seats beside each other
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bayer wins Supreme Court case making it harder to sue over glyphosate in Monsanto's Roundup
top_signals.summary: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly used weedkiller in agriculture, and it has long been linked to cancer claims.

top_signals.title: Micron shares jump as blockbuster results spark Wall Street tech shake-up
top_signals.summary: Apple’s stock slides after company unveils price rises linked to ‘unprecedented’ cost of memory chips

top_signals.title: UK bank to pay £32mn to clients of WealthTek
top_signals.summary: CACEIS UK, the sub-custodian bank for the collapsed wealth manager, comes to agreement with FCA

top_signals.title: Two solicitors linked to Post Office scandal charged with misconduct
top_signals.summary: Two solicitors have been charged with alleged misconduct in relation to the Horizon IT scandal and have been referred to The Solicitors Disciplinary Tribunal. The Solicitors Regulation Authority (SRA), the legal regulator for English and Welsh solicitors, said it is taking action against Jane MacLeod, the former Post Office general counsel from 2015 to 2019, [...]

top_signals.title: Ares Management flagship private credit fund slammed with withdrawal requests
top_signals.summary: Ares Management was plagued by investors attempting to pull out over $1.5bn from one its flagship private credit funds in the second financial quarter, as wealthy individuals continue to flee the asset class. The firm’s Ares Strategic Income fund, which holds roughly $11bn (£8.3bn), said it has received redemption requests worth 14.4 per cent of [...]

top_signals.title: Floating Nuclear: A New Offshore Energy Frontier
top_signals.summary: For decades, floating nuclear power occupied a niche position in the energy debate – technically feasible, strategically intriguing, but commercially marginal. Today, however, combined pressures of decarbonization, energy security, land constraints…
